title: BOM District Showdown
subtitle: Player Registration & Pack Commitment Status
thankYouExtra: Thank you for the extra {n} {pack} — your generosity means a lot to the event!
fetchError: ⚠ FAILED TO FETCH DATA — CHECK CONNECTION
rulesDrama: No drama — be respectful to everyone
rulesName: Do not change your in-game name during the event so we can track gold & purchases accurately
rulesOnline: Be online to roll dice on Friday and weekends for best possible ranking
rulesHowText: New to DS? Watch the overview below — at 1:10 it shows the exact pack you need to purchase
rulesYourPack: Purchase 1× merchant pack (the pack that gives 1 dice to everyone) → 1× 1999 gold
rulesYourDeadline: All packs must be purchased before Saturday 16:00 UTC
rulesYourLeave: If you need to leave the alliance before the event ends, make sure your dice are at 0 — they reset on leave
rulesYourStay: Don't leave after Saturday 16:00 UTC — 24h in alliance is required for gold distribution
rulesYourKey: Keep your key to raid a specific alliance (announced in next mail, Sunday 12:00 UTC)
rulesOurGold: 90% of gold donations refunded at event end — only if you complete your commitment
rulesOurMerit: Distribute Merit Chests to top DS rankers
rulesOurGate: Open the gate for your farm accounts (ask in alliance chat)
rulesOurRemind: Send reminders throughout the week — Horde schedule, alliance to raid in DS, etc.
rulesSponsor1: You must complete your purchase pack for sponsoring someone, please let us know who you're sponsoring to.
rulesSponsor2: Sponsors must buy extra pack to cover the player they sponsoring — e.g. sponsoring 2 people = buying 3 packs total
rulesSponsor3: Sponsored players show 💠 Sponsored status; the sponsor's pack count reflects their total purchases
rulesSponsor4: Sponsorship notes are visible in the Note column of the list
rulesFooter: Have fun, have a laugh, and thank you for joining ❤
